title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop]
description: Pink quartz crystals and fiery red rubies line the white stone walls leading to a broad ruby-studded tunnel down, reflecting their multihued light across the floor.  The faint movement of large amounts of water can be heard down the tunnel's mouth.  Next to the opening, a pastel-hued cloth banner trimmed with silver threads and its riot of colors draws the eye.  Nearby, some wide stone benches carved with a bubble motif are a place for respite.  Alongside them, a marble side table offers refreshments.
